title: coryphopteris brevipilosa
intro: Coryphopteris brevipilosa is a type of fern plant, specifically a species of the Coryphopteris genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coryphopteris brevipilosa are said to include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Coryphopteris brevipilosa are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
